title: CS2box
description: A Counter-Strike 2 inspired loot box mod for NeoForge 1.21.1. Open cosmetic cases to obtain random items with rarity tiers, modeled after CS2's case opening system. Unofficial migration from Forge 1.20.1.
body:
# CS2 Box — NeoForge 1.21.1 

This project is AI-assisted. Use at your own risk.

A Counter-Strike 2 inspired loot box mod that brings CS2's case opening experience to Minecraft. Open cases with or without keys, view item collections, and receive random items with color-coded rarity tiers.

## What This Mod Does

- Case Opening System: Right-click a case in your main hand to open a UI showing the case and its possible drops
- Key System: Some cases require a specific key to open; consume keys from your inventory
- Item Rarity Tiers: Items are categorized into 5 rarity levels with colored frames:
  - White (Common)
  - Light Blue (Uncommon)
  - Blue (Rare)
  - Purple (Epic)
  - Gold (Legendary)
- 3D Case Preview: Drag the case model to rotate it and inspect it from any angle
- Progress Screen: A CS2-style animated item reveal with physics-based item scrolling
- Configuration: All case contents and drop rates are configurable via `csgobox.toml`
- CraftTweaker Support: Define custom cases and drops using CraftTweaker scripts

## Why You Should Download

- Brings the excitement of CS2 case opening into Minecraft
- Perfect for server economies, reward systems, or custom adventure maps
- Lightweight and focused — no bloat, just case opening
- Compatible with NeoForge 1.21.1 and works alongside major mods like Create, JEI, Iris, and more
- Fully configurable — add your own cases, items, and drop rates without touching code

## Important Information

###  AI-Assisted Development
This project was developed with AI assistance. While we strive for quality, there may be undiscovered issues. Please test in a safe environment before using on production servers.

### Non-Official Migration
This is an unofficial migration of the original CS2 Box mod:
- Original author (Forge 1.20.1): Reclizer
- Forge 1.20.1 migration: ChloePrime
- NeoForge 1.21.1 migration (this version): wikkd

This version is independently maintained and is not affiliated with the original authors or Valve Corporation.

### Requirements
- Minecraft: 1.21.1
- Mod Loader: NeoForge 21.1.115 or newer
- Java: 21

### Dependencies
- NeoForge (required)
